## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is healthy for early stages, with growing impressions across articles](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [GrowthX transitioning to proprietary platform Atlas for more tailored content creation](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Continuing focus on backup/archive topics (80%) while introducing other clusters (20%)](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Pausing on direct competitive comparisons until product messaging is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Impressions growing across multiple articles, indicating healthy progress](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Clicks still low, as expected for early stages](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Flosum already showing up in some LLM results (mainly ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [GrowthX working on benchmarks and targets for future performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### New GrowthX Platform: Atlas

  - [Proprietary platform enabling more tailored content creation](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Features include customizable inputs (personas, CTAs, writing guides)](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Improved efficiency and output quality expected](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Future capability for client access and use beyond blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Continuing focus on backup/archive topics (80% of content)](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Introducing other topic clusters (20%) like DevOps, branded thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Pausing on direct competitive comparisons until product messaging is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Reducing specific product mentions in upcoming articles while messaging is refined](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Technical SEO

  - [Jakub received website errors from Matt](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [GrowthX to review and categorize issues they can address vs. those for Flosum's agency](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [9 articles staged for publishing this week](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Additional articles to be ready for review by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide benchmarks and performance targets for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Jakub to review and categorize website errors, determining GrowthX vs. agency responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue producing backup/archive content while introducing other topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Flosum team to review staged content on Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [GrowthX to notify Flosum team when new articles are ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/oFJiUUksBbuXZWZ3347_HsNo85jEuxez?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
